ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO DEFENDANT OLASCOAGA, ROSSANA (SUED AS ROXANA OLASCADAOA)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-08-2009 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ROSSANA OLASCOAGA'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND PER DIEM FEES AND DENIED AS TO COURT APPOINTED INTERPRETER'S FEES FOR WITNESSES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY GIVEN TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: WENDY PUN CSR# 12891 (206)

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, CASE SETTLED; PARTIES AGREE AND SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WHICH IS NOT FILED WITH THE COURT THIS DAY; TRIAL DATE REMOVED. JPT DON SULLIVAN; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-218).
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
